top3.sql:
SELECT d.surname
FROM qualifying q
JOIN drivers d ON q.driverId = d.driverId
JOIN races r ON q.raceId = r.raceId
WHERE r.raceId = 19 AND q.position = 2
ORDER BY CAST(q.q2 AS REAL) ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT d.surname
FROM qualifying q
JOIN drivers d ON q.driverId = d.driverId
JOIN races r ON q.raceId = r.raceId
WHERE r.raceId = 19
  AND q.q2 IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY q.q2 ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT d.surname
FROM qualifying q
JOIN drivers d ON q.driverId = d.driverId
JOIN races r ON q.raceId = r.raceId
WHERE r.raceId = 19 AND q.position = 2
ORDER BY CAST(q.q2 AS REAL) ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT d.surname
FROM qualifying q
JOIN drivers d ON q.driverId = d.driverId
JOIN races r ON q.raceId = r.raceId
WHERE r.raceId = 19
  AND q.q2 IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY q.q2 ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT d.surname
FROM qualifying q
JOIN drivers d ON q.driverId = d.driverId
JOIN races r ON q.raceId = r.raceId
WHERE r.round = 19
  AND q.q2 IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY CAST(q.q2 AS INTEGER) ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT d.surname
FROM qualifying q
JOIN drivers d ON q.driverId = d.driverId
JOIN races r ON q.raceId = r.raceId
WHERE r.raceId = 19 AND q.position = 2
ORDER BY CAST(q.q2 AS REAL) ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT d.surname
FROM qualifying q
JOIN drivers d ON q.driverId = d.driverId
JOIN races r ON q.raceId = r.raceId
WHERE r.raceId = 19
  AND q.q2 IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY q.q2 ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT d.surname
FROM qualifying q
JOIN drivers d ON q.driverId = d.driverId
JOIN races r ON q.raceId = r.raceId
WHERE r.round = 19
  AND q.q2 IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY CAST(q.q2 AS INTEGER) ASC
LIMIT 1;

final.sql:
SELECT d.surname
FROM qualifying q
JOIN drivers d ON q.driverId = d.driverId
JOIN races r ON q.raceId = r.raceId
WHERE r.raceId = 19 AND q.position = 2
ORDER BY CAST(q.q2 AS REAL) ASC
LIMIT 1;
